description: You are an industrial ecologist conducting an uncertainty analysis for a carbon footprint study of electricity generation. Using openLCA, the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip), and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip), quantify the uncertainty in the global warming potential (GWP) of coal-fired electricity generation. The analysis must utilize a product system for a coal electricity generation process with at least three process input parameters defined by uncertainty distributions. Perform a Monte Carlo simulation with at least 500 iterations and export the mean GWP, standard deviation, and 95% confidence interval to ~/LCA_Results/monte_carlo_results.csv.
